zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Elizabeth Drakes於1487年出生在英國越可爾卡爾福利時，她的父親John Drakes32歲，母親Margaret Amias27歲。她於1500年4月30日與Walter Calverley在英國越可爾卡爾福利結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1540年在她的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Elizabeth Drakes于1487年出生在英国越可爾卡爾福利时，她的父亲John Drakes32岁，母亲Margaret Amias27岁。她于1500年4月30日与Walter Calverley在英国越可爾卡爾福利结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1540年在她的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drakes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Drake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name from Drax (Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English dræg ‘portage, place where boats are dragged’ or dræg ‘drag net’, influenced by Old Norse drag ‘portage’, with a plural drages being shortened to drags, Drax.
In some cases perhaps an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) cognate in some other language.

variants.name: Drake
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English drake, either ‘drake, male duck’ (compare Duck ) or ‘dragon’ (Old English draca ‘snake, dragon’ or the cognate Old Norse draki), including an emblematic dragon on a flag (compare Dragon ). Both the Old English and the Old Norse forms are from Latin draco ‘snake, monster’; its sense as a nickname is unclear but it may have had the sense ‘standard bearer’. The name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century and reinforced by later English settlers in the 17th century.
German: from Low German drake ‘dragon’, familiar as image on signboards, hence a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn with such signboard.
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized and Flemish, of Draak, a cognate of 2 above, from draak (Middle Dutch drake) ‘dragon’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Elizabeth Drakes was born in 1487, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England, her father, John Drakes, was 32 and her mother, Margaret Amias, was 27. She married Walter Calverley on 30 April 1500, in Calverley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 9 daughters. She died in 1540, in her hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Elizabeth Drakes est née en 1487, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John Drakes, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Amias, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Calverley le 30 avril 1500, à Calverley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée en 1540, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Elizabeth Drakes 1487 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Drakes 32 und ihre Mutter Margaret Amias 27. Sie hat am 30. April 1500 in Calverley, Yorkshire, England Walter Calverley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb 1540 im Alter von 53 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Elizabeth Drakes è nata il nel 1487 nel Calverley, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, John Drakes, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Margaret Amias, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Walter Calverley il 30 aprile 1500, nel Calverley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel 1540, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Elizabeth Drakesが1487年にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーで生まれた時，父John Drakesは32歳，母Margaret Amiasは27歳であった。1500年4月30日にイギリスヨークシュアイアカルバーリーでWalter Calverleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1540年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Elizabeth Drakes(이)가 1487년 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Drakes(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Amias(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1500년 4월 30일 영국 요르크실르 캘벌리에서 Walter Calverley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1540년 그녀의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Elizabeth Drakes nasceu em 1487, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Drakes, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Amias, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Calverley em 30 de abril de 1500, em Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1540, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Elizabeth Drakes родилась в 1487 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Drakes было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Amias, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Calverley 30 апреля 1500 г. в местности калвирли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла в 1540 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Elizabeth Drakes nació en 1487, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Drakes, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Margaret Amias, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Walter Calverley el 30 de abril de 1500, en Calverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en 1540, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
